modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to delete a file in OneDrive.

full_description_text: The user was trying to delete a file in OneDrive but encountered an issue. They were on a call with the help desk analyst, expressing frustration over the inability to remove the file. The process seemed straightforward, yet the expected outcome was not achieved, leading to confusion. The user needed assistance to understand why the deletion was not successful.
short_description: Unable to delete a file in OneDrive.
description: The user was trying to delete a file in OneDrive but encountered an issue. They were on a call with the help desk analyst, expressing frustration over the inability to remove the file. The process seemed straightforward, yet the expected outcome was not achieved, leading to confusion. The user needed assistance to understand why the deletion was not successful.
